spec_match.rationale: Correctly demonstrates the Translator.availability API probe and uses the download progress monitor when creating a session.

interactive.rationale: Provides an exceptionally rich interactive N x N probe matrix, custom inputs, and detailed per-pair tests.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the technical realities of per-direction language pack availability in on-device AI.

edge_cases.rationale: Robustly handles non-API browsers with a heuristic predictor and implements download progress monitoring.

references.rationale: Includes proper references to the spec and ChromeStatus.

design_system.rationale: Implements a highly readable grid utilizing correct repository design system tokens and color contrast guidelines.

summary: An exceptional, high-fidelity concept demonstration that probes a language translation pair matrix in parallel, showing the user the asymmetry of language pack availability and letting them download/test any translation pair with real-time progress bar and streaming support.
